motto: Truth DNS — letter of RFC and applicable law on every resolver decision.

rfc_matrix.title: Domain Names — Concepts and Facilities
rfc_matrix.requirement: Recursive resolution must follow delegation chain from root.

rfc_matrix.title: Domain Names — Implementation and Specification
rfc_matrix.requirement: DNS message header: ID, flags, QDCOUNT; QNAME label sequence ≤255 octets.
rfc_matrix.nexus_control: UDP parser validates header and name compression pointers

rfc_matrix.title: Domain Names — Implementation and Specification
rfc_matrix.requirement: QTYPE IN class IN queries for A/AAAA resolution.

rfc_matrix.title: Domain Names — Implementation and Specification
rfc_matrix.nexus_control: Blocked domains return NXDOMAIN (3); miss returns SERVFAIL (2)

rfc_matrix.title: Clarifications to the DNS Specification
rfc_matrix.requirement: TTL interpretation — cache honors minimum TTL semantics.

rfc_matrix.title: IDNA: Definitions and Document Framework
rfc_matrix.requirement: Internationalized domain labels encoded per IDNA before wire format.

rfc_matrix.title: Extension Mechanisms for DNS (EDNS(0))
rfc_matrix.requirement: OPT pseudo-RR for UDP payload size negotiation.
rfc_matrix.nexus_control: Standard UDP 512B baseline; EDNS surfaced in planetary posture

rfc_matrix.title: DNS Security Introduction and Requirements
rfc_matrix.requirement: Authenticate DNS data via DNSSEC chain of trust.
rfc_matrix.nexus_control: Trace path validates delegation; DNSSEC validation flagged per zone

rfc_matrix.title: Resource Records for DNS Security Extensions
rfc_matrix.requirement: RRSIG, DNSKEY, NSEC/NSEC3 records in signed zones.

rfc_matrix.title: Protocol Modifications for DNSSEC
rfc_matrix.requirement: Resolver must set AD bit only when data verified.
rfc_matrix.nexus_control: Truth resolver does not forge AD

rfc_matrix.title: Special-Use Domain Names
rfc_matrix.requirement: localhost. names resolve only to loopback.

rfc_matrix.title: DNS Transport over TCP
rfc_matrix.nexus_control: UDP-first; TCP noted in resolver policy

rfc_matrix.title: Specification for DNS over TLS (DoT)
rfc_matrix.requirement: Port 853 TLS encapsulation — optional client path.
rfc_matrix.nexus_control: Foreign DoT resolvers stopped; local truth path only

rfc_matrix.title: DNS Queries over HTTPS (DoH)
rfc_matrix.nexus_control: DoH bypass blocked under planetary EXTREME envelope

rfc_matrix.title: DNS Resolver Integrity Extensions
rfc_matrix.requirement: Resolver must not substitute answers without operator policy.
rfc_matrix.nexus_control: No shortcut public DNS; trace-only answers

legal_framework.title: Computer Fraud and Abuse Act
legal_framework.requirement: No exceeding authorized access to obtain information from protected computers.
legal_framework.nexus_application: DNS poisoning and unauthorized resolver hijack treated as CFAA-class harm vectors.

legal_framework.title: Computer Fraud and Abuse Act
legal_framework.requirement: Knowingly causing damage to protected computers.
legal_framework.nexus_application: NXDOMAIN blocklist and segment blocks for DNS tunnel exfil (DNS_TUNNEL vector).

legal_framework.title: Communications Act — CPNI
legal_framework.nexus_application: Resolver query logs stay local on field drive; no third-party DNS leakage.

legal_framework.title: EU General Data Protection Regulation
legal_framework.requirement: Personal data processed with integrity and confidentiality.
legal_framework.nexus_application: Loopback resolver; foreign ISP DNS (Charter, Google, Cloudflare) egress stopped.

legal_framework.title: EU General Data Protection Regulation
legal_framework.requirement: Appropriate technical measures for security of processing.
legal_framework.nexus_application: EXTREME watcher bundle + truth DNS for EU-facing flows.

legal_framework.title: Network and Information Security
legal_framework.requirement: DNS service providers implement security risk management.
legal_framework.nexus_application: Planetary DNS posture table with per-region EXTREME controls.

legal_framework.title: COPPA
legal_framework.requirement: Verifiable parental consent before collecting children's data.
legal_framework.nexus_application: Ad tracking domains blocked at resolver when adblock lists apply.

legal_framework.title: Registrar Accreditation Agreement
legal_framework.nexus_application: RDAP/WHOIS lookups documented in research cross-ref; not forged locally.

legal_framework.title: CPNI rules (voice/Broadband)
legal_framework.nexus_application: ISP DNS redirection (Charter/Spectrum) classified foreign resolver — blocked.

foreign_resolvers_blocked.name: Charter/Spectrum
foreign_resolvers_blocked.reason: ISP DNS redirection — 47 CFR CPNI class
